summary: AAPL is showing positive momentum with price above the 20-day moving average and positive return momentum, but MACD is weakening, indicating some caution.
bullish_factors: Price is above the 20-day moving average.
The 12-day EMA is above the 26-day EMA, supporting positive momentum.
The stock has positive 5-day return momentum.
The stock has positive 20-day return momentum.
bearish_factors: MACD is below its signal line, indicating weakening momentum.
